positive: A highly detailed, central mandala composition depicting cosmic celestial elements combined with stylized flora. The design features intertwined geometric patterns, glowing nebula streaks, crescent moons, and stylized jungle foliage. Use a deep indigo, midnight blue, and teal color palette, accented with iridescent gold foil and luminous white accents. The overall style should be a harmonious blend of ornate Zentangle, psychedelic watercolor wash, and clean linework. The composition must be designed for optimal print placement on apparel, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast against a solid, dark background. Cinematic, high-resolution, symmetry, intricate details.
